# vendor/  (gitignored)

Drop bonk's proprietary files here. They are local build inputs only — never
committed, never shipped.

You provide:
- `alpha2s.js`            — bonk's client source (build input for bonk-core.mjs)
- `Box2DModuleGJMod.js`   — bonk's box2d build (build input for box2d.esm.js)

Generated by the build scripts (also gitignored):
- `bonk-core.mjs`   ← `node server/build-core.mjs ./vendor/alpha2s.js ./vendor/bonk-core.mjs`
- `box2d.esm.js`    ← `node server/wrap-box2d.mjs ./vendor/Box2DModuleGJMod.js ./vendor/box2d.esm.js`

Determinism note: `Box2DModuleGJMod.js` must be the exact build your client loads.
A different box2dweb will desync replays mid-playback.
